tasks.label: QEMU (gdbstub, paused)
tasks.command: make iso && echo __QEMU_BG_BEGIN__ && (qemu-system-x86_64 -cdrom bld/falseos.iso -d int -no-reboot -m 8000M -smp cores=4 -debugcon stdio -device i8042 -device nec-usb-xhci,id=xhci -device usb-mouse,bus=xhci.0,port=1,id=usbmouse0 -device usb-kbd,bus=xhci.0,port=2,id=usbkbd0 -S -s & echo $! > .vscode/qemu.pid; echo __QEMU_BG_READY__; wait $!)
